title: Helm company-profile config (HELM-P4-J1)
description: Static JSON, no backend, hosted by the embedder at any https:// URL and loaded via ?config=<url> (Swagger-UI pattern) or a saved per-browser setting. Config is DATA never code: no field carries executable content, a script reference, or a URL the app evaluates as anything other than an https fetch target. Every field is optional except schema_version/profile_name — a profile that only restyles, only retemplates, or only redirects the anchor relay is valid.

templates.description: Template slugs to feature on Choose, in display order. Absent/empty = no curation, daemon's full /templates list shows unfiltered.

branding.description: CSS custom-property overrides applied to :root (e.g. "--accent"). Values are plain CSS value strings set via style.setProperty — never parsed as HTML/JS. Keys not matching ^--[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$ are ignored by the loader, not rejected here.

pinned_kernel_versions.description: kernel_id -> pinned semver string. Informational/display only in this WU (HELM-P4-J1) — no enforcement engine yet.
